name: @lode/cli
description: CLI installer for Lode skills — guided setup for Claude Code and Codex

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run copy-skills && npm run check-skills
scripts.copy-skills: rm -rf ./skills && mkdir -p ./skills && find ../skills -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d -name 'lode-*' ! -name '*-workspace' -exec sh -c 'for d do [ -f "$d/SKILL.md" ] && cp -R "$d" ./skills/; done' sh {} + && find ./skills -type d -name evals -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
